name: 哈迪
bio: 哈迪，沙漠中最强大的战士。他在单人游戏中极为强势，以飞行闪避攻击反制几乎所有英雄，同时治愈自身。
bio_en: Hadi Ismail, the strongest warrior in the desert. He is extremely potent in solo game mode, countering almost any hero with his flying dodge attack while healing himself.
story: 哈迪，沙漠中最强大的战士。他以飞行闪避攻击反制几乎所有英雄，同时治愈自身，是单人游戏中最强势的英雄之一。他的存在让敌人望而生畏。

skills.skill_description: 腾空而起，向目标位置发动空中突袭，造成大量伤害并恢复自身生命值。冷却25秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Leap into the air and launch an aerial assault on the target location, dealing massive damage and restoring own HP. Cooldown: 25s.

skills.skill_description: 腾空而起，向目标位置发动连续空中突袭，造成大量伤害并恢复自身生命值。冷却28秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Leap into the air and launch consecutive aerial assaults, dealing massive damage and restoring own HP. Cooldown: 28s.

skills.skill_description: 召唤沙漠风暴，对范围内所有敌人造成持续伤害，并使其移速降低。持续15秒。怒气上限75000。
skills.skill_description_en: Summon a Desert Storm, dealing continuous damage to all enemies in range and slowing them. Duration: 15s. Rage limit: 75000.

skills.skill_description: 召唤强化沙漠风暴，对范围内所有敌人造成持续伤害，同时提升自身攻击力。持续15秒。怒气上限75000。
skills.skill_description_en: Summon an enhanced Desert Storm, dealing continuous damage to all enemies while boosting own attack. Duration: 15s. Rage limit: 75000.
